title: ReMemory - Create Bundles
page_description: Add your files, choose who to trust, and set how many must agree for recovery. Each person gets a self-contained bundle. Everything runs locally — nothing leaves your browser.
subtitle: Keep your important files within reach — even if you can't reach them yourself.
friends_hint: Each person here will hold one piece of your recovery key
anonymous_hint: They won't see each other's names
import_summary: Import contacts from an existing project.yml
files_drop: Drag & drop a folder here, or click to select files
files_hint: These will be protected and divided among your friends
error_not_ready_message: The bundle creator is still loading.
error_import_guidance: Check that the YAML is well-formed, properly indented, and that each entry has a name.
error_generate_guidance: Check that each friend has a name and that you've added at least one file.
validation_message: Fill in the highlighted fields before generating.
validation_guidance: Each friend needs a name, and at least one file must be added.
threshold_guidance: Think about who might be reachable at the same time. A lower number is more forgiving if someone is unavailable.
timelock_hint: Even with enough pieces, the files stay locked until this date.
timelock_max_exceeded: Two years is the longest time lock the web tool supports. For longer durations, use the CLI.
timelock_network_hint: Recovery will need a brief internet connection to verify the time lock.
how_creating_add: Add your files and choose who you trust
how_creating_threshold: Decide how many people must agree to recover
how_creating_generate: Each person gets a unique bundle
how_creating_send: Send each bundle however works best
how_recovery_combine: Combine enough pieces and the files are unlocked
how_recovery_offline: No server, no internet, nothing to install
how_security_local: Everything runs in your browser — nothing leaves your device
how_security_offline: This page works offline — save it with File › Save As
update_nudge_title: A newer version may be available
